title: Wicker Park Chicago Food Allergy Friendly City Guide

places.name: Big Star
places.quote: There are limited nut offerings on the menu, and their tortillas are gluten-free.

places.name: Dove's Luncheonette
places.quote: Please be aware that one of Dove’s homemade hot sauces, available at each table, contains almonds.

places.name: Small Cheval
places.quote: There are gluten-free options available and no nuts on the menu.

places.name: Parlor Pizza
places.quote: There are very limited nuts on the menu.

places.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
places.quote: All ice cream flavors have allergen warnings displayed. They offer nut-free, dairy-free, egg-free and gluten-free options.
